extraction.one_line_summary: ULISSI Diego won the uphill sprint finish after attacking to break up the peloton with 8km to go on the final climb
tactical_patterns: ULISSI's late attack (8km out) on final climb fractured sprinter field before uphill finish sprint.
DEGENDT Thomas aggressively swept both KOM and intermediate sprint from breakaway, revealing stage hunting priorities.
Astana hemorrhaged six riders after VLASOV abandon mid-stage, exposing catastrophic team vulnerability early in Grand Tour.

rider_signals.VLASSI Alexander: negative: abandoned stage 2 with stomach issues, eliminating Astana's GC depth catastrophically early
rider_signals.ULISSI Diego: positive: seventh Giro stage win via tactical late climb attack demonstrates retained uphill sprint punch
rider_signals.DEGENDT Thomas: positive: dominated breakaway competitions suggesting good early form for stage hunting
rider_signals.ALMEIDA Joao: neutral: retained pink jersey through flat stage without incident
rider_signals.CONSONNI Simone: negative: crashed alongside VIVIANI before key sprint, Cofidis lost both sprint options
rider_signals.LOPEZ Miguel: negative: already out of Giro before stage 2 finish, part of Astana implosion
